* {{ill|Mikumano Shrine (Hanamaki)|ja|三熊野神社 (花巻市)|12=draft}} - Located in [[Iwate Prefecture]], [[Hanamaki City]]. Officially named '''Kumano Shrine'''. * {{ill|Mikumano Shrine (Kakegawa)|ja|三熊野神社 (掛川市)|12=draft}} - Located in [[Shizuoka Prefecture]], [[Kakegawa City]].
{{Disambiguation}}
[[simple:user:immanuelle/Mikumano Jinja]]
